Cool New update:

In this latest update, We have Implemented significant Changes for all characters by giving them more detailed baclstories. These additions are designed to make their roles feel more connected and impactful within the unfolding narrative, adding new layers to their their personalities And their place in the World of forsaken reacts to themselves. This update sllows players rp react to themselves and engage with a rocher, more developed Story.

Note: The update has Led to a high incrase in the permanent token count.

I was inspired by a particularly thoughtful and encouraging comment. We want to give a huge thank you to dereck in the comment, as his feedback was sole reason this bot receivee a much-needed update
